mechanism: Preclinical evidence suggests sesquiterpenes may enhance GABAergic tone and reduce neuroinflammatory signaling; robust human mechanistic confirmation is still limited.
contraindications: avoid in pregnancy due to insufficient safety data
use caution with sedative medications and alcohol
interactions: may have additive sedation with CNS depressants
use caution with antiepileptic and anxiolytic medications
safetyNotes: Traditionally used as a calming nervine. Drowsiness and gastrointestinal discomfort are possible; avoid combining with other sedatives until better interaction data are available.
